dialogues: One more family. 10s. Here are the multiples of 10: 10, 20, 30, 40, 50 all the way to 100. See the pattern?
The products ALL end in zero. See the factor multiplied by 10 with the product? Multiplying by 10 just puts a zero at the end of the other factor. 4 times 10? 4 with a zero. 40.
Right. 7 times 10 equals 70. 7 with a zero. The pattern works.
